{{Relic Infobox|Fragrant Mushroom|2}}
{{R|Fragrant Mushroom||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Hungry for Mushrooms|2}} event. Upon pickup, you will lose 15 HP and {{KW|Upgrade||2}} 3 random cards.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Hungry for Mushrooms|2}} event by selecting {{Frame|Text=|Fragrant Mushroom}} and losing 15 hp.
